{{Infobox character
| name = Little Blue
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|scrub a spirit clean of Blackflame aura buildup}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|, touch and affect madra, cleanse and reinforce madra channels, flood Orthos with power}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|, purify corruption of her spirit, consume spirits to grow more powerful}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Riverseed]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|, [[Herald]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Sylvan]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|, companion}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Lindon's pocket}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, [[Lindon's void key]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|, Yerin's soulspace}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Blackflame (novel)|Blackflame]]
}}

''See also: [[Little Blue Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Little [[Blue]] is a naturally occurring spirit composed entirely of ocean-blue madra. She typically manifests as a small, humanoid figure—often described as being roughly the size of a hand or a few inches tall—with features resembling a woman, including flowing hair and a dress that is an extension of her body. Her appearance can fluctuate in color, ranging from pale or nearly white when exhausted to a deep azure or sapphire. While she possesses significant intelligence and personality, she communicates through various auditory signals such as chirps, whistles, chimes, and burbles. In terms of capability, Little [[Blue]] serves as a supportive entity with the power to cleanse and pacify hostile elements within a spirit. She can provide comfort by sending soothing sparks through a person's channels to relieve spiritual stress, though these interactions can sometimes be painful. She is capable of manifesting advanced techniques like the [[Empty Palm]], the [[Hollow Domain]], and the [[Soul Cloak]], and she can even grow to human size. Despite her small stature, she possesses substantial spiritual weight, comparable to an [[Archlord weapon]]. She often resides in [[Lindon]]'s pack, [[soulspace]], or on his person, and she has demonstrated the ability to manifest complex environments, such as a primordial forest, to enhance other spiritual landscapes.}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Little Blue]] is a [[Sylvan]] that sits on [[Lindon]]'s head.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14">''Blackflame'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Little Blue]] is also known as the [[Riverseed]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Little Blue]]'s power can scrub a spirit clean of [[Blackflame aura]] buildup.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Little Blue]] is kept in a tank.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Little [[Blue]] is a real spirit and [[Remnant]] composed of ocean-blue madra. After being kept in a case by [[Lindon]]'s captors, the creature emerged from his robes to cling to his hair and sit upon his head. This small being makes high-pitched burbles and possesses the ability to soothe [[Lindon]]'s spirit and channels with a cold spark. While Little [[Blue]] can wash madra channels clean, the power does not expel parasites. During her time with [[Lindon]], she cleansed some of his channels and even attempted to heal his shattered spirit.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Little Blue]] is a real spirit or [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Little Blue]] is made of ocean-blue madra.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Little Blue]] cleansed some of [[Lindon's madra]] channels.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8">''Skysworn'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Little Blue]] is one of [[Lindon]]'s belongings.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9">''Skysworn'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Little Blue]] is a creature that clings to [[Lindon]]'s hair and makes high-pitched burbles.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12">''Skysworn'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Little Blue]] can soothe [[Lindon]]'s channels and spirit with a cold spark.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Little Blue]] is a character that pops up from inside [[Lindon's robes]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Little Blue]] has an ocean-blue body.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Little Blue]] is seated on [[Lindon]]'s head.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Little Blue]] was kept in her case by [[Lindon]]'s captors.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Little Blue]]'s power washes madra channels clean and does not expel parasites.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16">''Skysworn'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Little Blue]] attempted to heal [[Lindon]]'s shattered spirit.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Little [[Blue]] is a [[Sylvan Riverseed]] and a deep ocean blue spirit that appears as a woman made of deep blue madra. To assist [[Lindon]] with his recovery, this small creature scurried up his back and onto his head, eventually curling on the floor near him. Although this chirping, bell-like entity can cleanse and reinforce madra channels or flood [[Orthos]] with power, it was once in no shape to provide treatment for the [[dragon]]. This [[Highgold]] core spirit can touch and affect [[madra]], can be stored in [[Lindon]]'s pocket, and is currently located in [[void]] storage after crawling out of his pocket.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Little Blue]] is the [[Sylvan Riverseed]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2">''Ghostwater'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Little Blue]] is a spirit that looks like a woman made of deep blue madra.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3">''Ghostwater'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] needs [[Little Blue]]'s help to recover.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c5">''Ghostwater'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Little Blue]] is a creature that lives in a habitat consisting of two halves lying in the sand.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6">''Ghostwater'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Little Blue]] is a creature that scurried up [[Lindon]]'s back and onto his head.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Little Blue]] is a creature that chirps.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8">''Ghostwater'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Little Blue]] is an entity that jumps on [[Orthos]]' head.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Little Blue]] has a healing touch.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Little Blue]] is a creature that was curled on the floor near [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Little Blue]] does not need to sleep.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Little Blue]] is in no shape to provide treatment for [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Little Blue]] is a spirit that can be stored in [[Lindon]]'s pocket.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11">''Ghostwater'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Little Blue]] is a creature that can touch and affect [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c12">''Ghostwater'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Little Blue]] can cleanse and reinforce madra channels.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13">''Ghostwater'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Little Blue]] is a deep ocean blue spirit.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Little Blue]] is a small creature that chimes like a bell.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Little Blue]] is a creature that can flood [[Orthos]] with power.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Little Blue]] tumbled onto the ground.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Little Blue]]'s pure core is [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16">''Ghostwater'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Little Blue]] is a [[Sylvan]] that squeaks and can whistle.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c18">''Ghostwater'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Little Blue]] is located in [[void]] storage.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Little Blue]] is a creature that crawled out of [[Lindon]]'s pocket.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Little [[Blue]] is a tiny [[Sylvan]] spirit with an ocean-blue face, appearing as a woman made of deep blue light that reaches only six inches in height. After being discovered inside a bundle of firewood within the [[void key]] space, the creature began accompanying [[Lindon]] and reacting to his various surprises. Throughout their journey, the small spirit has been seen playing with [[Suriel]]’s marble, sitting on [[Lindon]]'s collar, or resting in his pocket. Little [[Blue]] has listened to [[Lindon]]'s stories and even sobbed with a sound like pattering rain, though the spirit is currently too weak to remain unaffected by the boundary field. Despite this weakness, [[Lindon]] may ask for her help as she continues to go with him.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Little Blue]] is a tiny spirit in the shape of a woman made of deep blue light.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c2">''Underlord'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Little Blue]] is a small creature that can reach six inches in height.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Little Blue]] clings to [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Little Blue]] is a creature that accompanies [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Little Blue]] is a character that reacts to [[Lindon]]'s surprise.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Little Blue]] was inside a bundle of firewood within the [[void key]] space.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Little Blue]] is playing with [[Suriel]]’s marble.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4">''Underlord'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Little Blue]] is a spirit that applauds.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Little Blue]] is a creature that sits on [[Lindon]]'s collar.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Little Blue]] is a creature that can be held in [[Lindon]]'s [[Remnant]] fingers.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c7">''Underlord'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Little Blue]] is in [[Lindon]]'s pocket.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Little Blue]] listened to [[Lindon]]'s story.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Little Blue]] is a creature that [[Lindon]] can cycle [[Heaven's Drop]] to.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Little Blue]] is a creature that sobs with a sound like pattering rain.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Little Blue]] is a [[Sylvan]] with an ocean-blue face.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] may ask [[Little Blue]] for help.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Little Blue]]'s power is deep blue.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Little Blue]] is currently too weak to be unaffected by the boundary field.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Little Blue]] has gone with [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Little [[Blue]] is a spirit that [[Lindon]] can pull from his [[soulspace]]. This creature typically hides behind [[Lindon]] and communicates through a series of whistles and chimes. The entity is capable of helping [[Lindon]] with his core and can relieve pain within his spirit. Additionally, Little [[Blue]] has injected soothing [[madra]] into [[Lindon]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Little Blue]] is a creature that hides behind [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Little Blue]] can relieve pain in [[Lindon]]'s spirit.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Little Blue]] communicates through a series of chimes and whistles.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c5">''Uncrowned'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Little Blue]] injected soothing [[madra]] into [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c6">''Uncrowned'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Little Blue]] can help [[Lindon]] with his core.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Little Blue]] is a spirit that [[Lindon]] can pull from his [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A naturally formed spirit of pure blue madra, Little [[Blue]] is a creature with real intelligence who often sleeps in a flowerpot or rests on [[Lindon]]'s shoulder. During a match, she stood on [[Lindon]]'s head and even covered her eyes, later demonstrating her ability to produce a mournful flute note or roll a scale across a desk. Appearing with ocean-blue hair and a sapphire dress, she can fly on a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] and provides support for [[Lindon]]'s techniques by empowering his [[pure madra]]. While she is kept inside [[Lindon's void key]], she has channeled [[madra]] into a priest from his pocket and berated him for refusing her assistance. Throughout their bond, she has run across the deck of [[Eithan's cloudship]], attempted to pull [[Lindon]] and [[Ruby]]'s hands apart, and stood on [[Lindon]]'s chest to provide him with encouragement.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Little Blue]] sleeps in a flowerpot.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Little Blue]] stood on [[Lindon]]'s head to watch the match.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Little Blue]] leans on [[Lindon]]'s shoulder.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Little Blue]] covered her eyes during the match.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Little Blue]] is a spirit that can produce a mournful flute note.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Little Blue]] is a spirit that can climb on [[Lindon]]'s shoulder.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Little Blue]] is a creature that can roll a scale across a desk.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Little Blue]] is a creature with detail or real intelligence.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Little Blue]] is a naturally formed spirit of [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Little Blue]] has ocean-blue hair and wears a sapphire dress.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Little Blue]] can fly on a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Little Blue]]'s [[madra]] is blue and provides support for [[Lindon]]'s techniques.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Little Blue]] channeled [[madra]] into the priest from [[Lindon]]'s pocket.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Little Blue]] is kept inside [[Lindon's void key]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Little Blue]]'s presence empowers [[Lindon]]'s [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Little Blue]] berated [[Lindon]] for not accepting her help.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Little Blue]] runs around the deck of [[Eithan's cloudship]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Little Blue]] is a trembling creature held by [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] has a bond with [[Little Blue]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Little Blue]] attempted to pull [[Lindon]] and [[Ruby]]'s hands apart.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24">''Wintersteel'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Little Blue]] stood on [[Lindon]]'s chest.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Little Blue]] provided encouragement to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Little [[Blue]] is a one-foot-tall creature capable of communicating through chirps, ringing tones, and a bell. After letting out a loud peep, the creature expressed concern for [[Yerin]] before [[Lindon]] placed it inside his [[void key]]. While traveling with [[Lindon]] and [[Orthos]], Little [[Blue]] frequently sits atop the head of [[Orthos]]. During one instance, it issued a whistle of alarm from its position on the table. Ultimately, Little [[Blue]] assisted in the recovery of both [[Mercy]] and [[Ziel]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Little Blue]] is a creature that can communicate through a bond and rings a bell.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4">''Bloodline'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Little Blue]] gave a loud peep.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Little Blue]] is a character who regards [[Yerin]] with concern.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] can slip [[Little Blue]] into his [[void key]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Little Blue]] sits on [[Orthos]]'s head and communicates with chirps and ringing tones.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8">''Bloodline'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Little Blue]] is seated on the table.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Little Blue]] is one foot in height.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Little Blue]] gave a whistle of alarm.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Little Blue]] is with [[Lindon]] and [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Little Blue]] sits atop [[Orthos]]' head.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Little Blue]] has seen to the recovery of [[Mercy]] and [[Ziel]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Little [[Blue]] is an ocean-blue, foot-tall spirit of high existence who travels upon a small cloud and wears a dress made of ocean blue madra. As a companion to [[Lindon]], she often whistles, provides comfort, or rings like a bell when panicked. While she initially expressed reluctance to face another [[Dreadgod]] and became addicted to training [[Kelsa]], she eventually found herself among the captives held by [[Mercy]]. During her time with the group, she clung to [[Orthos]]'s back as his partner and cheered during various thrills. After being hidden by [[Lindon]], she later reacted with shock and an offended clang before ultimately trembling in terror at [[Eithan]]'s true power, resulting in her hugging his shin.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] is an ocean-blue woman about a foot tall who drives a small cloud.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] expressed reluctance to fight another [[Dreadgod]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] is a character whose attention was not enough to restore [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] is a companion of [[Lindon]] who can whistle.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6">''Reaper'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] wears a dress with ocean blue madra.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] has grown addicted to training [[Kelsa]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] burbled that she did not feel well.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] is present with the group.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] made a tinkling sound in agreement with [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11">''Reaper'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] cheered at the thrill of the leap.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] reinforced his protection of [[Little Blue]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]]'s voice rang with her impatience.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12">''Reaper'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] whispered comfort to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] is missing from [[Lindon]]'s shoulder.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] is a creature that clings to [[Orthos]]' back.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] is a spirit with a high level of existence.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17">''Reaper'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] hid [[Little Blue]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] glared at [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] cheered the new hammer.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] is a character that rings like a bell when panicked.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] is a listener.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] is [[Orthos]]'s partner.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21">''Reaper'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] was one of the captives.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] was being held by [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] felt shock.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] gave an offended clang.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]]'s trembling sounded like the jingling of glass shards.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] trembles in terror before [[Eithan]]'s true power.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] hugged [[Eithan]]'s shin.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Little [[Blue]] is a spirit that resides within [[Yerin]]'s [[soulspace]], where she possesses the ability to purify her own spiritual corruption and consume spirits to increase her power. As a spirit that turns purple while absorbing energy, she can pull a hunger spear from [[Yerin]]'s soul and even emerge from the [[soulspace]] to act as [[Yerin]]'s companion. Though she experiences pain and power fluctuations caused by clashing red light, she manages her [[madra]] through inner focus. Originally passed by the [[Blood Sage]], this creature communicates by cooing questions to [[Yerin]] or whispering from her shoulder. Little [[Blue]] is known to cheer like frozen bells, run around on [[Orthos]]' head, and ring out like a bell to wish [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] luck.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Little Blue]] can purify corruption of her spirit.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Little Blue]] can consume spirits to grow more powerful.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Little Blue]] is inside [[Yerin]]'s [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Little Blue]] is a spirit that resides in [[Yerin]]'s [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9">''Dreadgod'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Little Blue]] can pull a hunger spear out of [[Yerin]]'s soul.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Little Blue]] is a spirit that can absorb power and turns purple when doing so.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Little Blue]] is a spirit that can emerge from [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14">''Dreadgod'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Little Blue]] is a companion of [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Little Blue]] is a spirit that can experience pain and power fluctuations.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Little Blue]]'s power is clashing with red light inside her.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Little Blue]] cycles her [[madra]] with an inner focus.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Little Blue]] was passed by the [[Blood Sage]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Little Blue]] is a creature that cooed a question to [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Little Blue]] is on [[Yerin]]'s shoulder and can whisper to her.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Little Blue]] cheered like frozen bells.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Little Blue]] is a character who can cheer and run around on [[Orthos]]' head.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Little Blue]] rang out like a bell to wish [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] good luck.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21" />}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Initially appearing as a small creature alongside [[Lindon]] and [[Ziel]], Little [[Blue]] is a spirit contracted to [[Lindon]] who can inspire [[Orthos]] with her energy. During training, her body flickers purple, and she eventually demonstrates [[Archlord]]-level capabilities by deflecting [[madra]] attacks to defend herself and [[Orthos]]. After advancing to the [[Herald]] stage, she manifests a physical body resembling a woman with opaque pale blue skin and navy hair, allowing her to speak and radiate an [[aura]] of blood and dream. In combat, she utilizes [[Empty Palm]] techniques magnified by [[Lindon's madra]] to strike the [[Weeping Dragon]] and wipe out numerous [[Striker techniques]]. Throughout these conflicts, she provides vital support by cooling [[Orthos]]'s channels with her [[madra]] and using [[pure madra]] to soothe [[Mercy]]'s cracked channels.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] is a character present with [[Lindon]] and [[Ziel]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2">''Waybound'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] applauded.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]]'s body flickers purple during training.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] is a creature that can inspire [[Orthos]] with her energy.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is concerned that [[Little Blue]] may only be following him because he and [[Yerin]] want her to.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] defended [[Orthos]] and herself by deflecting [[madra]] attacks and disrupting spiritual power.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] is at a level comparable to [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] was standing on [[Mercy]]'s stomach.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] was training in a cycling position inside the [[Blackflame cycling chamber]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] wished [[Orthos]] constant encouragement while he fought.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]]'s [[madra]] flooded through [[Orthos]]'s channels to cool them.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] opened [[Lindon's void key]] to take out [[Archlord natural treasures]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] resembles a woman with pale blue, solid and opaque skin and deep navy hair.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17">''Waybound'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] is a spirit who can take the body of a grown human woman.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] has a contracted bond with [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] advanced to [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]]'s advancement to [[Herald]] involved her spirit manifesting physically into a body.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] radiates dream and blood [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] can speak.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] clashed against the [[Weeping Dragon]] with [[Orthos]] and [[Little Blue]] behind him.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] wiped out [[Striker techniques]] by the dozen with an [[Empty Palm]] the size of her new human body.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]]'s techniques were magnified by [[Lindon]]’s [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] struck the Dragon with an [[Empty Palm]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] is pursued by a swarm of lightning-dragons.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] possesses a copy of [[Dross]] in her hand.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20">''Waybound'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] unleashed techniques to block the [[Weeping Dragon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] is someone [[Ziel]] was protecting from the [[Weeping Dragon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Akura Malice]]'s shadows crept up to [[Little Blue]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] worked on [[Ziel]]'s spirit.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] used [[pure madra]] to soothe [[Mercy]]'s cracked madra channels.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] would have a difficult time establishing authority over the [[Weeping Dragon]]'s [[binding]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] nodded at [[Lindon]]'s words.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] is no longer six inches tall.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] is a spirit that was crying with [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] struggled to defeat a shadow [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] was taking a beating.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] uses a [[Hollow Domain]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]]'s spirit was fading.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] is not supposed to be where she is and uses [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] drew from [[Lindon]]'s cores.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] can use an [[Empty Palm]] technique.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] flanks [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] can stand at human height.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37">''Waybound'', chapter 37</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A [[Sylvan Riverseed]] monster known as Little [[Blue]], this creature possesses a laugh like tinkling bells and snores like wind through silver leaves. While present during the unloading of crates, Little [[Blue]] sat atop [[Orthos]]'s shell and demonstrated the ability to grow to a human-sized form. During combat, the entity used an [[Empty Palm]] attack, utilized the [[Hollow Domain]], and protected [[Ziel]] and [[Carmine]] with a wall of blue-white power. Little [[Blue]] proved capable of crushing techniques with sheer strength and [[pure madra]], eventually placing a foot on [[G-42]]'s chest while whistling in triumph. Accompanying [[Ziel]] on a mission, Little [[Blue]] cheered alongside [[Mercy]] before flying away in excitement when [[Ziel]] drifted off.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Little Blue]] is a [[Sylvan Riverseed]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Little Blue]] is a monster that laughs like tinkling bells.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Little Blue]] can assume a human-sized form.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Little Blue]] can use the [[Hollow Domain]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Little Blue]] uses harsh chimes to communicate.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Little Blue]] is a character who can hold a feathered [[dragon]] with both hands.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Little Blue]] is a character who snores like wind through silver leaves.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Little Blue]] is present during the unloading of the crates.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Little Blue]] is a creature that sits atop [[Orthos]]'s shell.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Little Blue]] can wipe out techniques with [[pure madra]] and crush them with sheer strength.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Little Blue]] can grow to human size.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Little Blue]] uses an [[Empty Palm]] attack.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Little Blue]] provides protection for [[Ziel]] and [[Carmine]] using a wall of blue-white power.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Little Blue]] put her foot on [[G-42]]’s chest and whistled in triumph.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Little Blue]] accompanied [[Ziel]] on a mission.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Little Blue]] cheered with [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Little Blue]] is a character who flew away in excitement when [[Ziel]] drifted off.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|“Can’t keep calling her the Riverseed. She’s got a face.”<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Lindon thought of the glass ball burning quietly in his pocket. "I humbly agree." ... Charity focused on Little Blue, who ducked shyly behind a lock of Lindon's hair.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|"Blue?" Lindon asked hesitantly. "Can you��speak?"<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
